page: Vultr vcg-a16-12c-128g-32vram is a Cloud GPU instance configured with 12 vCPUs and 128.0 GB of system memory. The processing power is driven by an Intel x86_64 Core Processor based on the Broadwell architecture, running at 2.0 GHz across 12 physical cores with a shared CPU allocation. This system includes 16 MB of L3 cache and supports instruction sets such as AVX, AES, and FMA, though it lacks AVX-512 capabilities.

For hardware acceleration, the instance is equipped with two NVIDIA Ampere A16 GPUs, delivering a combined 32 GB of VRAM. Local storage is provided via a 700 GB NVMe SSD, ensuring fast read and write access for local datasets. In benchmark testing, the server achieved a stress-ng single-core CPU score of 1754.67 and a multi-core score of 21080.54, placing its CPU performance in the average tier.

The high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 10.67 GB per core, combined with dual GPUs and local NVMe storage, makes this instance suitable for workloads requiring parallel processing and moderate memory footprints. It is designed for virtual desktop infrastructure hosting, video streaming, media transcoding, and entry-level machine learning inference tasks.
description: Vultr vcg-a16-12c-128g-32vram is a Cloud GPU instance featuring 12 vCPUs on an Intel x86_64 Broadwell architecture running at 2.0 GHz, paired with 128.0 GB of system memory. The hardware configuration includes two NVIDIA Ampere A16 GPUs providing a total of 32 GB VRAM, alongside 700 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. In performance testing, the instance recorded a stress-ng single-core score of 1754.67 and a multi-core score of 21080.54, representing average CPU performance. Given its dual-GPU setup and high memory-to-core ratio of 10.67 GB, this server is optimized for graphics-intensive workloads, media transcoding, virtual desktop infrastructure, and moderate machine learning inference tasks.
og_description: Vultr vcg-a16-12c-128g-32vram is a Cloud GPU server featuring 12 Intel vCPUs, 128 GB of system RAM, a 700 GB local NVMe SSD, and two NVIDIA Ampere A16 graphics cards with 32 GB of total VRAM.
meta_description: Vultr vcg-a16-12c-128g-32vram is a Cloud GPU instance with 12 Intel vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, two NVIDIA A16 GPUs, and 700 GB NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: A dual-GPU accelerated instance featuring 32 GB VRAM, 128 GB RAM, and local NVMe storage for graphics and parallel computing workloads.
